notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ FIPS Compliant for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 26 CVEs: CVE-2022-3545, CVE-2022-41858, CVE-2023-1252, CVE-2023-2176, CVE-2023-3567, and 21 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
